title: Familiar Aviary
description: A bird that gives the player a way to explore the world.
body:
[Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/xHRwb8mPKB)

Includes a new bird that gives access to a new way to explore the world.

Spirit Crow:
- Wait for feathers to drop. The Feathers can be used to craft the Bird Skull Mask.

Bird Skull Mask:
- The mask turns the player into one of the Crows, able to fly using a bound button. The bound button is set to the spacebar by default.
